auth.resetComplete: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
auth.inviteAccepted: Account activated. Sign in to get started.
auth.inviteLinkExpired: That invite link has expired. Ask your hotel owner to resend it.

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.noRoomTypes: No room types yet. Add your first one to get started.

roomType.name: Name
roomType.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate this room type? It will be hidden from new bookings but its history is kept.
roomType.photoUrlHint: Paste a link to a photo hosted elsewhere. Shown on your public booking page.

room.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate this room? It will be hidden from the booking and status boards.

formErrors.validation: Please check the form values and try again.
formErrors.duplicateRoomNumber: A room with that number already exists in this room type.
formErrors.activeBooking: This room has an active or upcoming booking and can't be deactivated.
formErrors.unavailable: Not enough rooms available for the selected dates. Try fewer rooms or different dates.
formErrors.notAllRoomsAssigned: Assign a room to every slot before checking in.
formErrors.roomConflict: That room is already booked for these dates.
formErrors.razorpayError: Razorpay couldn't complete that request. Please try again.
formErrors.invoiceNotCheckedOut: An invoice can only be generated after the guest has checked out.
formErrors.invoiceAlreadyExists: An invoice already exists for this booking.
formErrors.channelNoImportUrl: Add an import URL before syncing.
formErrors.channelSyncFailed: Sync failed. Check the import URL and try again.
formErrors.emailTaken: An account with that email already exists.
formErrors.refundExceedsPaid: The refund amount can't exceed what's actually been paid.
formErrors.cannotDeactivateSelf: You can't deactivate your own account.

rates.title: Rates & availability
rates.noRoomTypes: Add a room type first to manage rates.
rates.physicalRooms: {count, plural, one {# room} other {# rooms}} total

rateEdit.priceHint: Leave blank to use the base price.
rateEdit.availableOverrideHint: Leave blank to use the full room count.
rateEdit.resetConfirm: Remove the custom price/availability for this date and go back to the default?

bookings.title: Bookings
bookings.noRoomTypesYet: Add a room type first before creating bookings.
bookings.phoneMatchHint: If this phone number matches an existing guest, we'll link this booking to their profile.
bookings.assignAllHint: Assign a room to every slot before checking in.
bookings.noShowConfirm: Mark this booking as a no-show?

settings.bookingPageDescription: Share this link with guests so they can book directly and see live availability.
settings.razorpayDescription: Connect your own Razorpay account to send guests payment links. The platform never holds your funds — payments go straight to your Razorpay account.
settings.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect Razorpay? You'll need to re-enter your keys to reconnect.

public.noRoomTypes: No rooms are listed yet. Please check back soon.
public.roomsLeft: {count, plural, one {# room left} other {# rooms left}}
public.selectDatesHint: Select dates above to check availability and price.
public.bookingConfirmedHint: We've saved your booking. Details are below.
public.questionsContact: Questions about your booking? Contact us:
public.lookupNotFound: We couldn't find a booking matching those details.

channels.title: OTA calendar sync
channels.disclaimer: This syncs availability only — not full booking details or rates — and runs every few hours, not instantly.
channels.exportFeedLabel: Export feed (share this URL with the channel)
channels.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect this channel? Its blocked dates will no longer sync.
channels.importUrlPlaceholder: Paste the channel's iCal export URL (optional)

signup.title: Set up your hotel
signup.checkEmailBody: We've sent a verification link to your email address. Click it to activate your account.
signup.verifyLinkExpired: That verification link has expired. Enter your email below to get a new one.
signup.verifyLinkInvalid: That verification link isn't valid. Enter your email below to get a new one.
signup.resendSent: If that email is registered and not yet verified, we've sent a new link.

onboarding.title: Setup checklist
onboarding.subtitle: A few steps to get your hotel ready for bookings.
onboarding.roomsTitle: Add your first room type & rooms
onboarding.roomsDescription: Room types (e.g. Standard, Deluxe) and the physical rooms within them.
onboarding.channelsDescription: Sync availability with Booking.com, Airbnb, Agoda or MakeMyTrip via iCal.
onboarding.paymentsDescription: Accept online payments and send guests payment links.
onboarding.bookingPageDescription: Share this link with guests so they can book directly.

subscription.settingsDescription: Your hotel's subscription to this platform — ₹999/month, billed automatically via Razorpay.
subscription.cancelConfirm: Cancel your subscription? You'll lose access once your current period ends.
subscription.pastDueBanner: Your last payment failed — Razorpay is retrying. Update your payment method in Settings before your account is locked.
subscription.ownerLockedBody: Subscribe to keep using {hotelName} on this platform — ₹999/month, billed automatically via Razorpay.
subscription.staffLockedBody: This hotel's subscription has lapsed. Ask your hotel's owner to renew it to continue.

passwordReset.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
passwordReset.resetSent: If that email is registered, we've sent a reset link.
passwordReset.resetLinkInvalid: That reset link isn't valid. Request a new one below.
passwordReset.resetLinkExpired: That reset link has expired. Request a new one below.

team.title: Team
team.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate this team member? They'll lose access immediately.
team.name: Name
team.settingsDescription: Add and manage your hotel's staff accounts.
team.acceptInviteSubtitle: Choose a password to activate your account.
